nasb.text: You shall sacrifice the Passover to the Lord your God from the flock and the herd, in the place where the Lord chooses to establish His name.

esv.text: And you shall offer the Passover sacrifice to the Lord your God, from the flock or the herd, at the place that the Lord will choose, to make his name dwell there.

cnv.text: 你要在耶和華選擇立為他名的居所的地方，把羊和牛作逾越節的祭牲獻給耶和華你的　神。

ccb.text: 你们要在你们的上帝耶和华选定的敬拜场所，把牛羊作为逾越节的祭牲献给祂。
